description: Quality gate criteria for /broker-checker. Source of truth: docs/broker-content/broker-checker-spec.md

criteria.check: All 18 template sections present in correct order
criteria.severity_if_fail: P0 if >=3 missing, P1 if 1-2 missing

criteria.check: All numeric claims (spreads, fees, instruments, regulators) match input.json
Regulator names, tiers, countries, license numbers match input.json
Competitor metrics match input.json competitors block
H1 contains broker_name and year
>=3 H2 headings contain target keywords from brief
>=10 internal link placeholders [→ INTERNAL: {topic}]
>=5 FAQ questions
CFD/forex risk disclaimer present in Hero section
Not financial advice disclaimer in footer
Author attribution block with name, credentials
Methodology section present
No AI patterns from humanization-patterns.md (categories A, B, C)
criteria.severity_if_fail: P1 if >=3 found, P2 if 1-2 found

criteria.check: Expert Take blockquote present with first-person voice
Schema.org Review type present and valid
Schema.org Article type present
Schema.org Product type present
Schema.org FAQPage type present with >=5 questions
Schema.org BreadcrumbList present
Word count >= 4000
